visual_description: A wide, static shot reveals a vast, dimly lit library. The room is filled with towering shelves packed with countless books, creating a dense, almost overwhelming landscape. The architecture is grand, with high, arched ceilings, suggesting a large, historic building. The lighting is minimal, casting deep shadows and highlighting the textures of the books and the dark wood of the shelves. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The audio is filled with a grand and sweeping orchestral score. The music is slow and majestic, with a melancholic and awe-inspiring tone. It evokes a sense of wonder and vastness, as if exploring a magnificent and ancient place. The melody is carried by a full orchestra, creating a rich and layered soundscape that feels both mysterious and powerful. There is no dialogue or narration, allowing the powerful music to create an immersive and emotional atmosphere. The camera cuts to a close-up, over-the-shoulder shot, focusing on a young man with glasses in the foreground. His face is partially obscured by shadow, but his expression is one of intense concentration and awe. In the blurred background, another young man, slightly out of focus, stands amidst the bookshelves, looking around
